name: SCLEROSING PERITONITIS
definition: ENCAPSULATING PERITONEAL SCLEROSIS = PERITONITIS CHRONICA FIBROSA INCAPSULATA = bowel partially / totally encased / wrapped in thick fibrous membrane forming several
distribution: central clustering of fixated small bowel loops
discriminating_features: "abdominal cocoon" = encasement of small bowel loops by a fibrocollagenous capsule:
central clustering of fixated small bowel loops
peritoneal calcifications of parietal and visceral peritoneum

general: "abdominal cocoon" = encasement of small bowel loops by a fibrocollagenous capsule:
central clustering of fixated small bowel loops
peritoneal calcifications of parietal and visceral peritoneum
mural fibrosis + thickening of small bowel along its antimesenteric wall → adhesions →
